content.content:
1ã# Frontend Style Guide ã Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2ã
     3ãWelcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4ãThis version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5ã
     6ã> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ã
     7ã
     8ã---
     9ã
    10ã## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11ã- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12ã- [Components & Screens ã Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13ã- [Atomic Components ã Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14ã- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15ã- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16ã- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17ã- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18ã- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19ã- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20ã- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21ã- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22ã- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23ã
    24ã---
    25ã
    26ã## Introduction
    27ã
    28ãThe goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.  
    29ã
    30ãKey decisions:
    31ã- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32ã- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33ã- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34ã- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35ã
    36ã---
    37ã
    38ã## Components & Screens ã Hook Component Pattern
    39ã
    40ãEach screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41ã
    42ã```
    43ãscreens/Home/
    44ãããã index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45ãããã view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46ãããã Models/
    47ã    ããã index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48ã```
    49ã
    50ã**Models/index.d.ts**
    51ã```ts
    52ãexport interface HomeParams {
    53ã  welcome?: string;
    54ã}
    55ãexport interface HomeState {
    56ã  greeting: string;
    57ã  isLoading: boolean;
    58ã}
    59ãexport interface HomeHandlers {
    60ã  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61ã}
    62ãexport type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63ã```
    64ã
    65ã**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66ã```ts
    67ãimport { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68ãimport type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69ãimport { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70ã
    71ãexport function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72ã  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73ã  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74ã
    75ã  useEffect(() => {
    76ã    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77ã    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78ã  }, []);
    79ã
    80ã  const greeting = useMemo(
    81ã    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82ã    [params?.welcome, name]
    83ã  );
    84ã
    85ã  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86ã    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87ã  }, []);
    88ã
    89ã  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90ã}
    91ã```
    92ã
    93ã**view.tsx (render)**
    94ã```tsx
    95ãimport React from "react";
    96ãimport { View } from "react-native";
    97ãimport { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98ãimport { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99ãimport type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100ã
   101ãtype Props = HomeParams;
   102ã
   103ãexport default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104ã  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105ã
   106ã  if (isLoading) {
   107ã    return (
   108ã      <View>
   109ã        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110ã      </View>
   111ã    );
   112ã  }
   113ã
   114ã  return (
   115ã    <View>
   116ã      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117ã      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118ã    </View>
   119ã  );
   120ã}
   121ã```
   122ã
   123ã---
   124ã
   125ã## Atomic Components ã Hook Component Pattern
   126ã
   127ã```
   128ãatomic/atoms/Button/
   129ãããã index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130ãããã view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131ãããã Models/
   132ã    ããã index.d.ts
   133ã```
   134ã
   135ã**Models/index.d.ts**
   136ã```ts
   137ãexport interface ButtonProps {
   138ã  text: string;
   139ã  disabled?: boolean;
   140ã  onPress?: () => void;
   141ã}
   142ãexport interface ButtonState {
   143ã  pressed: boolean;
   144ã}
   145ãexport interface ButtonHandlers {
   146ã  handlePress: () => void;
   147ã}
   148ãexport type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149ã```
   150ã
   151ã**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152ã```ts
   153ãimport { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154ãimport type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155ã
   156ãexport function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157ã  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158ã
   159ã  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160ã    setPressed(true);
   161ã    props.onPress?.();
   162ã    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163ã  }, [props.onPress]);
   164ã
   165ã  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166ã}
   167ã```
   168ã
   169ã**view.tsx (render)**
   170ã```tsx
   171ãimport React from "react";
   172ãimport { Pressable, View } from "react-native";
   173ãimport { Text } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
   174ãimport { useButton } from "./index";
   175ãimport type { ButtonProps } from "./Models";
   176ã
   177ãexport default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   178ã  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   179ã
   180ã  return (
   181ã    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   182ã      <View>
   183ã        <Text>{props.text}{pressed ? " ãÂ" : ""}</Text>
   184ã      </View>
   185ã    </Pressable>
   186ã  );
   187ã}
   188ã```
   189ã
   190ã---
   191ã
   192ã## Project Organization
   193ã
   194ã```
   195ãsrc/
   196ãããã @types/            # Global TS types
   197ãããã assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198ãããã atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199ãã   ããã atoms/
   200ãã   ããã molecules/
   201ãã   ããã organisms/
   202ãããã modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203ãããã screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204ãããã services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205ãã   ããã api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206ãã   ããã class/         # Class with logical requests
   207ãã   ããã hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208ãã   ããã repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209ãã   ããã services/      # Business orchestration
   210ãã   ããã storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211ãã   ããã store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212ãã   ããã models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213ãã   ããã utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214ãã   ããã index.ts       # Public exports
   215ãããã hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216ãããã routes/            # Navigation config
   217ãããã settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218ãããã utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219ã```
   220ã
   221ã> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222ã
   223ã---
   224ã
   225ã## Services Architecture
   226ã
   227ã**Flow:** `UI ã services ã repository ã api` and `UI ã services ã store (Zustand)`
   228ã
   229ã- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.  
   230ã- **class/**: class with logical requests.  
   231ã- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232ã- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.  
   233ã- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.  
   234ã- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.  
   235ã- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).  
   236ã- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.  
   237ã- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238ã
   239ãPrinciples:
   240ã- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241ã- No circular dependencies.
   242ã- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243ã
   244ã---
   245ã
   246ã## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247ã
   248ã- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.  
   249ã- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.  
   250ã- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.  
   251ã- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252ã
   253ã**Slice example**
   254ã```ts
   255ãimport type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256ãimport type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257ã
   258ãexport type AuthSlice = {
   259ã    auth: AuthState;
   260ã    authActions: AuthActions
   261ã};
   262ã
   263ãconst initialAuth = {
   264ã    user: null,
   265ã    loading: false,
   266ã    error: undefined,
   267ã}
   268ã
   269ãexport const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270ã    auth: initialAuth,
   271ã    authActions: {
   272ã        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273ã        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274ã        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275ã        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276ã    }
   277ã});
   278ã```
   279ã
   280ã**Root Store**
   281ã
   282ã- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps ã including SuperApp.
   283ã
   284ã```ts
   285ãimport { create } from "zustand";
   286ãimport { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287ãimport { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288ã
   289ãimport { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290ãimport { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291ã
   292ãimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293ã
   294ã/** Add your slice Type */
   295ãexport type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296ã
   297ãexport const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298ã  devtools(
   299ã    persist(
   300ã      immer((...a) => ({
   301ã        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302ã        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303ã      })),
   304ã      {
   305ã        name: "root-storage",
   306ã        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307ã        partialize: (s) => ({
   308ã          user: s.user,
   309ã          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310ã        }),
   311ã        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312ã      }
   313ã    ),
   314ã    { name: "RootStore" }
   315ã  )
   316ã);
   317ã```
   318ã
   319ã- For Use on Class.
   320ã
   321ã```ts
   322ãclass Auth {
   323ã  private readonly setAuth;
   324ã
   325ã  constructor () {
   326ã    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327ã  }
   328ã
   329ã  function doSomething(data) {
   330ã    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331ã  }
   332ã}
   333ã```
   334ã
   335ã- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336ã- UI never imports the store directly ã uses selectors
   337ã
   338ã```ts
   339ãconst loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340ãconst token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341ã```
   342ã
   343ã---
   344ã
   345ã## Routes Naming
   346ã
   347ãStandardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:  
   348ã- ã `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)  
   349ã- ã `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350ã
   351ã---
   352ã
   353ã## Folder Naming Rules
   354ã
   355ã| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356ã|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357ã| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358ã| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359ã
   360ã---
   361ã
   362ã## Code Standards
   363ã
   364ã**Language**: English only.  
   365ã**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366ã
   367ã**Explanatory variables**  
   368ã```js
   369ãconst onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370ãconst getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371ãconst isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372ãisNumber(1);
   373ã```
   374ã
   375ã**Semantic constants**  
   376ã```js
   377ãconst DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378ãsetTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379ã```
   380ã
   381ã**Library workarounds with link**  
   382ã```js
   383ã// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384ã// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385ãevent.target.value = "";
   386ã```
   387ã
   388ã**JSDoc**  
   389ã```js
   390ã/**
   391ã * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392ã * @param {*} eventName
   393ã * @param {*} maxLength
   394ã */
   395ã```
   396ã
   397ã**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**  
   398ã```ts
   399ãuseEffect(() => {
   400ã  (async () => {
   401ã    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402ã    setSum(42);
   403ã  })();
   404ã}, [
   405ã  setSum,
   406ã]);
   407ã```
   408ã
   409ã**Extract conditions**  
   410ã```ts
   411ãconst hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412ãif (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413ã```
   414ã
   415ã**Optional chaining**  
   416ã```ts
   417ãconst answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418ã```
   419ã
   420ã**JSX indentation**  
   421ã```tsx
   422ã{
   423ã  !isEnd && (
   424ã    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425ã  )
   426ã}
   427ã```
   428ã
   429ã**Early returns**  
   430ã```ts
   431ãif (!data) return null;
   432ãreturn <View />;
   433ã```
   434ã
   435ã**Nullish coalescing**  
   436ã```ts
   437ãreturn data ?? 0;
   438ã```
   439ã---
   440ã
   441ã## Styles Patterns
   442ã
   443ã- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.  
   444ã- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445ã
   446ã---
   447ã
   448ã## Cache Pattern
   449ã
   450ãKeep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451ã
   452ã```ts
   453ãimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454ã
   455ãexport interface CachedData<T> {
   456ã  timestamp: number;
   457ã  data: T;
   458ã}
   459ã
   460ãexport interface StorageContract<T> {
   461ã  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462ã  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463ã  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464ã}
   465ã
   466ãexport class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467ã  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468ã
   469ã  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470ã    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471ã    if (!json) return null;
   472ã    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473ã  }
   474ã
   475ã  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476ã    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477ã    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478ã  }
   479ã
   480ã  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481ã    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482ã  }
   483ã}
   484ã```
   485ã
   486ã**Guidelines**
   487ã- One storage class per module/feature.
   488ã- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489ã- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490ã- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491ã- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492ã
   493ã---
   494ã
   495ã## Checklist
   496ã
   497ã- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498ã- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499ã- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500ã- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501ã- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502ã- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503ã- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504ã
   505ã---
   506ã
   507ãHappy shipping! Þ

content.thinking:
I've read the entire STYLE_GUIDE.md file. This is a comprehensive frontend style guide for a project called "Sem Parar" (a Brazilian toll/payment company). Let me summarize the key points:

1. **State Management**: Zustand is the exclusive global/shared state manager (no Redux, no Context for state)

2. **Hook Component Pattern**: 
   - Screens and components are split into:
     - `index.ts` - logic hook (useXxxScreen)
     - `view.tsx` - render-only component
     - `Models/index.d.ts` - types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)

3. **Project Organization**:
   - `@types/` - Global TS types
   - `assets/` - Images, fonts, icons
   - `atomic/` - UI components (atoms, molecules, organisms)
   - `modules/` - Microfrontends and native modules
   - `screens/` - Page-level screens
   - `services/` - Domain logic with SOLID layering
   - `hooks/` - Cross-cutting React hooks
   - `routes/` - Navigation config
   - `settings/` - Env & global config
   - `utils/` - General-purpose helpers

4. **Services Architecture**:
   - Flow: UI ã services ã repository ã api
   - UI ã services ã store (Zustand)
   - Layers: api, class, hooks, repository, services, storage, store, models, utils

5. **Zustand Patterns**:
   - Slices under `/services/<domain>/store/`
   - Use `persist` with `createJSONStorage` when needed
   - Keep setters pure; side effects in hooks or services
   - UI uses selectors, never imports store directly

6. **Naming Conventions**:
   - Routes: Acronym + Route (SPPayment, FTHPayment)
   - Directory structure uses PascalCase for atomic/screens/routes, camelCase for assets/hooks/services
   - Variables and functions in camelCase, components and classes in PascalCase, constants in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE

7. **Code Standards**:
   - English only
   - Explanatory variables
   - Semantic constants
   - JSDoc documentation
   - Multi-line deps in hooks with IIFE pattern
   - Early returns
   - Optional chaining
   - Nullish coalescing

8. **Styles**:
   - No StyleSheet or styled-components
   - Use @semparar/design-system for styling

, tokens, and theming

9. **Cache Pattern**:
   - GenericStorage class handles typed, serializable data
   - CachedData interface stores timestamp alongside data
   - StorageContract interface defines get, save, remove operations

content.text:
I've thoroughly studied the `STYLE_GUIDE.md`. Here's my understanding of the key architectural decisions:

**Core Pattern: Hook Component**
- Every screen/component splits into `index.ts` (logic hook) + `view.tsx` (dumb render) + `Models/index.d.ts` (types)
- UI is purely presentational; all logic lives in hooks

**State Management: Zustand-only**
- Single source of truth via slices under `/services/<domain>/store/`
- Root store combines slices with `devtools`, `persist`, and `immer` middleware
- UI accesses state via selectors, never directly

**Services Architecture (SOLID)**
- Flow: `UI ã services ã repository ã api` and `UI ã services ã store`
- Layers: `api/`, `class/`, `hooks/`, `repository/`, `services/`, `storage/`, `store/`, `models/`, `utils/`
- No circular dependencies; public APIs via `index.ts`

**Naming Conventions**
- Routes: `Acronym + Route` (e.g., `FTHPayment`)
- Folders: PascalCase for `atomic/screens/routes`, camelCase elsewhere
- Code: camelCase (vars), PascalCase (components/classes), UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (constants)

**Cache Pattern**
- `GenericStorage<T>` class with `CachedData<T>` wrapper (timestamp + data)
- Implements `StorageContract<T>` interface

**Styles**
- No `StyleSheet` or `styled-components` ã use `@semparar/design-system-app` exclusively

Ready for your instructions.

content.text:
Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the services layer architecture. Let me compile a detailed report.

## Comprehensive Services Layer Architecture Report

### 1. Folder Structure Overview

```
src/services/
ããã api/                    (4 files)
ããã models/                 (4 files)
ããã repository/             (3 files)
ããã services/               (4 files)
ããã store/                  (6 files)
ããã hooks/                  (2 files)
ããã utils/                  (2 files)
ããã constants.ts
ããã moment.ts
ããã index.ts               (re-exports all)
```

---

### 2. Domains/Features Identified

The architecture is organized around **4 primary domains**:

#### A. **Points Extract** (Transaction history & balance)
- Manages reward points transaction extracts and balance
- Handles pagination and filtering of transaction history
- Supports grouping transactions by date

#### B. **Permission** (Redemption access control)
- Manages user redemption permissions
- Tracks whether user has redeemed invoice cashback
- Controls redemption eligibility

#### C. **Parameter** (Program info & FAQs)
- Stores FAQ and informational content about the points program
- Manages program rules and details
- Supports categorized Q&A sections

#### D. **Airline Miles** (Marketplace integration)
- Integrates with airline mileage marketplace
- Manages token-based access to marketplace redirect
- Handles marketplace catalog access

---

### 3. Implementation Pattern: Clean Architecture with Layered Design

Each domain follows a **5-layer architecture**:

```
Domain Flow:
API (HTTP) ã Service (Business Logic) ã Repository (Data Mapping) ã Store (State) ã Hook (React Integration)
```

#### **Layer 1: API (`/api`)**
Direct HTTP clients using shared `api` instance from `@semparar/mf-app-user`

**Extract API** (`extract.api.ts`):
```typescript
// Main endpoints
- POST fintech/v1/rewardProgram/extract (paginated transactions)
- GET fintech/v1/rewardProgram/balance (total points)
// Handles request payload building with default pagination
```

**Parameter API** (`parameter.api.ts`):
```typescript
- GET /fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-parameter
// Fetches FAQ/info categories
```

**Permission API** (`permission.api.ts`):
```typescript
- GET fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission (check redemption status)
- POST fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission (mark as redeemed)
```

**Airline Miles API** (`airlineMiles.api.ts`):
```typescript
// Class-based singleton pattern
- GET /marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=/mileage
// Returns redirect URL for marketplace access
```

#### **Layer 2: Models (`/models`)**
TypeScript interfaces and enums defining domain contracts

**Extract Models**:
- `PointsExtractStatus` (idle, loading, success, error)
- `PointsBalanceStatus` (idle, loading, success, error)
- `PointsTransaction` (id, date, description, type, amount, icon, details)
- `PointsExtractData` (transactions[], pagination)
- `ProcessedExtractData` (grouped and mapped transactions for UI)
- `TransactionType` enum (CREDIT, RESCUE, EXPIRED)
- Date formatting mappings for periods (0ã7 days, 1ã15 days, etc.)

**Parameter Models**:
- `ParameterPointsProgramResponse` (API response structure)
- `ParameterPointsProgramValue` (questions, order, icon)
- `ParameterPointsProgramStatus` (idle, loading, success, error)

**Permission Models**:
- `PermissionDocument` (client code, permission value, status)
- `PermissionValue` (invoice cashback redemption tracking)
- `PermissionStatus` (idle, loading, success, error)

**Airline Miles Models**:
- `AirlineMilesTokenParams` (redirectTo, catalog)
- `AirlineMilesTokenResponse` (redirectURL, status code)
- `AirlineMilesState` (redirectURL, isLoading, isError, errorMessage)
- `AirlineMilesActions` (setRedirectURL, setLoading, setError, clearError, reset)

#### **Layer 3: Repository (`/repository`)**
Data transformation and mapping logic between API responses and domain models

**Extract Repository** (`extract.repository.ts`) - Most complex:
```typescript
// Core responsibilities:
1. getPointsExtractFromResponse() - Maps API response to PointsExtractData
2. processPointsExtractData() - Transforms data for UI consumption
   - Groups transactions by formatted date (e.g., "25 de janeiro")
   - Creates UI-ready card items with colors, icons, formatting
   - Sorts by date descending

// Helper functions:
- getMappedTransactionType() - API type ã domain TransactionType
- getFormattedDateForHeader() - Date formatting with moment
- getFormattedPointsValue() - Currency formatting with +/- prefix
- getTransactionCardItem() - Creates UI card props from transaction
- getGroupedTransactionsByDate() - Groups and sorts transactions
- PointsDataGroupedByDayMapper.getMappedData() - Flattens grouped data with labels
```

**Parameter Repository** (`parameter.repository.ts`):
```typescript
// Single responsibility:
mapParameterPointsProgramResponse() - Parses JSON string in "Saiba Mais" category
- Extracts categories from nested structure
- Maps icon names to design system icons
- Maintains metadata (dateCreated, status, PK, dateUpdated)
```

**Permission Repository** (`permission.repository.ts`):
```typescript
// Single responsibility:
mapPermissionResponse() - Extracts permission value from API response
```

#### **Layer 4: Service (`/services`)**
Business logic orchestrating API calls, data mapping, and store updates

**Extract Service** (`extract.service.ts`):
```typescript
getPointsExtract(payload?: GetPointsExtractPayload)
- Implements pagination logic with shouldFetchExtract guard
- Handles load-more pattern with appendExtractData
- Extracts participantId from JWT token
- Analytics event tracking (success/error)
- Status state management

getPointsBalance()
- Simpler single-call pattern with shouldFetchBalance guard
- Parses flexible response format (returnCode or codigoRetorno)
- Analytics event tracking
```

**Parameter Service** (`parameter.service.ts`):
```typescript
getParameterPointsProgram()
- Single-fetch pattern with LOADING/SUCCESS caching
- Validates response before mapping
```

**Permission Service** (`permission.service.ts`):
```typescript
checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string) - Check redemption status
markAsRedeemed(accountId: string) - Record redemption with timestamp
- Uses JWT token for implicit auth
- Returns boolean for integration flexibility
```

**Airline Miles Service** (`airlineMiles.service.ts`):
```typescript
// Thin wrapper (pass-through pattern)
getToken(params) ã airlineMilesApi.getToken()
- Uses singleton instance for consistency
```

#### **Layer 5: Store (`/store`)**
Zustand-based state management with slice composition

**Root Store Composition** (`slices.ts`):
```typescript
RewardsProgramRootStore combines:
- ParameterPointsProgramSlice
- PermissionSlice
- AirlineMilesSlice
- PointsExtractSlice
```

**Extract Store** (`extract.store.ts`):
```typescript
State:
- pointsExtract: { extractData, processedExtractData, status, isLoadingMore, error }
- pointsBalance: { points, status, error }
- pointsExtractFilters: { appliedTransactionsFilters }

Actions:
- setExtractStatus(status)
- setExtractData(extractData, processedExtractData) - First load
- appendExtractData(extractData, processedExtractData) - Pagination merge
- setLoadingMore(boolean)
- setBalanceStatus(status)
- setBalance(points)
- setTransactionsFilters(filters)
- clearTransactionsFilters()
- reset()

Note: appendExtractData merges transactions and filtered mapped transactions
```

**Parameter Store** (`parameter.store.ts`):
```typescript
State:
- parameterPointsProgram: { data, selectedCategory, status }

Actions:
- setStatus(status)
- setData(data[])
- setSelectedCategory(selectedCategory)
- reset()
```

**Permission Store** (`permission.store.ts`):
```typescript
State:
- rewardsPermission: { hasRedeemed (null|boolean), status }

Actions:
- setStatus(status)
- setHasRedeemed(boolean)
- reset()
```

**Airline Miles Store** (`airlineMiles.store.ts`):
```typescript
State:
- airlineMiles: { redirectURL, isLoading, isError, errorMessage }

Actions:
- setRedirectURL(url)
- setLoading(boolean)
- setError(message)
- clearError()
- reset()

Note: setLoading clears error state; setError clears loading state
```

---

### 4. Integration Layer: Hooks

**usePermission** (`hooks/usePermission.ts`):
```typescript
// React hook combining Redux (account ID) + Zustand (store state)
const { hasRedeemed, isLoading, isError } = usePermission()

Methods:
- checkHasRedeemed(forceRefresh?) - Caches result, respects user account
- markAsRedeemed() - Calls service, updates store

// Integrates with Redux to get account ID: state.customerReducer.nrc
```

**useAirlineMiles** (`hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts`):
```typescript
// Pure Zustand hook with service integration
const { redirectURL, isLoading, isError, errorMessage } = useAirlineMiles()

Methods:
- fetchAirlineMilesToken() - Service call with error handling
- reset() - Clears state

// Uses useShallow for shallow equality optimization
```

---

### 5. Utilities

**participantId.ts**:
```typescript
getParticipantIdFromToken() - Decodes JWT access token
- Extracts NRC field (national registration code)
- Silent fail with undefined (no error throwing)
```

**cleanup.ts**:
```typescript
clearRewardsProgramStore() - Resets all slices
- Called on logout or module cleanup
- Resets Parameter, Permission, AirlineMiles slices
```

**moment.ts**:
```typescript
Configures moment.js with Portuguese locale
- Portuguese month names
- Portuguese month abbreviations
- Used for transaction date formatting throughout
```

---

### 6. Constants & Configuration

**constants.ts**:
```typescript
EXTRACT_CONSTANTS:
- DEFAULT_PAGE: 1
- DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE: 100
- SUCCESS_RETURN_CODE: 200
- BALANCE_SUCCESS_RETURN_CODE: 0

ANALYTICS_EVENTS:
- EXTRACT_SUCCESS/ERROR (location: monetizacao/hub_recompensas_spmais/extrato_hub_recompensas)
- BALANCE_SUCCESS/ERROR (location: monetizacao/spmais/home)
- Integrated with analytics tracking system
```

**models/airlineMiles.model.ts**:
```typescript
AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS (constant):
- redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE'
- catalog: '/mileage'
```

---

### 7. Key Architectural Patterns

#### **Data Flow Pattern**
```
Component (useHook) 
  ã
Hook (usePermission/useAirlineMiles or direct service import)
  ã
Service (business logic + API orchestration)
  ã
API (HTTP call via shared axios instance)
  ã
Repository (response mapping)
  ã
Store (state persistence via Zustand)
  ã
Hook re-renders component
```

#### **Caching/Guard Patterns**
- Extract: `shouldFetchExtract()` prevents re-fetching LOADING/SUCCESS
- Balance: `shouldFetchBalance()` prevents re-fetching LOADING/SUCCESS
- Parameter: Checks LOADING/SUCCESS status before fetching
- Permission: Caches result in Zustand (hasRedeemed !== null)

#### **Error Handling**
- Services: Silent failures (return false/undefined)
- Analytics tracking on both success and error
- Store updates with error state for UI feedback
- Timeout/retry handled implicitly by axios

#### **State Management Philosophy**
- **Zustand**: Single source of truth per slice
- **Shallow equality**: Optimization with `useShallow`
- **Slice composition**: Modular domain slices merged into root
- **Immer middleware**: Implicit (Zustand default)

#### **Pagination Strategy** (Extract-specific)
```typescript
First load: setExtractData() - replaces all
Load more: appendExtractData() - merges transactions and mapped items
Prevents refetch: shouldFetchExtract(status, isFirstPage)
```

#### **Type Safety**
- Full TypeScript coverage
- Separate API DTO types vs Domain types
- Discriminated unions for status enums
- Generic repository functions for flexibility

---

### 8. Integration Points

**External Dependencies**:
- `@semparar/mf-app-user` - Shared axios instance (`api`)
- `zustand` - State management with shallow comparison
- `axios` - HTTP client
- `moment` - Date manipulation (Portuguese locale configured)
- `jwt-decode` - Token parsing
- `@semparar/design-system-app` - UI component types

**Redux Integration** (minimal):
- `useSelector` in `usePermission` for account ID only
- Redux as legacy auth/account source
- Zustand as new domain state layer

**Storage Integration**:
- `~/redux/store/storage` - Access token persistence

---

### 9. Code Quality Observations

**Strengths**:
- Clear separation of concerns across layers
- Consistent error handling patterns
- Type-safe throughout
- Composition-based store architecture
- Transaction grouping/formatting thoroughly tested
- Analytics integrated at service level
- Guard clauses prevent unnecessary API calls

**Conventions**:
- File naming: `domain.layer.ts` (e.g., `extract.service.ts`)
- Index files re-export everything for clean imports
- Service functions are async but don't throw (safe defaults)
- Store actions mutate state through Zustand's immer
- Enums used for finite states (IDLE/LOADING/SUCCESS/ERROR)

**Processing Complexity** (Extract domain):
- `extract.repository.ts` (241 lines) handles sophisticated UI mapping
- Groups transactions by formatted dates
- Sorts by date with moment calculations
- Transforms backend format to UI card format
- Color mapping based on transaction type
- Analytics integration per card item

This is a modern, well-structured React/TypeScript service layer using proven patterns: clean architecture, domain-driven organization, and state management separation.

Store (state persistence via Zustand)
  ã
Hook re-renders component
```

#### **Caching/Guard Patterns**
- Extract: `shouldFetchExtract()` prevents re-fetching LOADING/SUCCESS
- Balance: `shouldFetchBalance()` prevents re-fetching LOADING/SUCCESS
- Parameter: Checks LOADING/SUCCESS status before fetching
- Permission: Caches result in Zustand (hasRedeemed !== null)

#### **Error Handling**
- Services: Silent failures (return false/undefined)
- Analytics tracking on both success and error
- Store updates with error state for UI feedback
- Timeout/retry handled implicitly by axios

#### **State Management Philosophy**
- **Zustand**: Single source of truth per slice
- **Shallow equality**: Optimization with `useShallow`
- **Slice composition**: Modular domain slices merged into root
- **Immer middleware**: Implicit (Zustand default)

#### **Pagination Strategy** (Extract-specific)
```typescript
First load: setExtractData() - replaces all
Load more: appendExtractData() - merges transactions and mapped items
Prevents refetch: shouldFetchExtract(status, isFirstPage)
```

#### **Type Safety**
- Full TypeScript coverage
- Separate API DTO types vs Domain types
- Discriminated unions for status enums
- Generic repository functions for flexibility

---

### 8. Integration Points

**External Dependencies**:
- `@semparar/mf-app-user` - Shared axios instance (`api`)
- `zustand` - State management with shallow comparison
- `axios` - HTTP client
- `moment` - Date manipulation (Portuguese locale configured)
- `jwt-decode` - Token parsing
- `@semparar/design-system-app` - UI component types

**Redux Integration** (minimal):
- `useSelector` in `usePermission` for account ID only
- Redux as legacy auth/account source
- Zustand as new domain state layer

**Storage Integration**:
- `~/redux/store/storage` - Access token persistence

---

### 9. Code Quality Observations

**Strengths**:
- Clear separation of concerns across layers
- Consistent error handling patterns
- Type-safe throughout
- Composition-based store architecture
- Transaction grouping/formatting thoroughly tested
- Analytics integrated at service level
- Guard clauses prevent unnecessary API calls

**Conventions**:
- File naming: `domain.layer.ts` (e.g., `extract.service.ts`)
- Index files re-export everything for clean imports
- Service functions are async but don't throw (safe defaults)
- Store actions mutate state through Zustand's immer
- Enums used for finite states (IDLE/LOADING/SUCCESS/ERROR)

**Processing Complexity** (Extract domain):
- `extract.repository.ts` (241 lines) handles sophisticated UI mapping
- Groups transactions by formatted dates
- Sorts by date with moment calculations
- Transforms backend format to UI card format
- Color mapping based on transaction type
- Analytics integration per card item

This is a modern, well-structured React/TypeScript service layer using proven patterns: clean architecture, domain-driven organization, and state management separation.

# mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram

React Native microfrontend for **Reward Program** (Programa de Pontos). Consumed by SuperApp (`appSemPararv3`).

## Migration Context

Migrating rewards code from `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` to this dedicated repository.

**Why this migration:**
- Source repository (card-place) was **cleaned** to contain **only rewards-related code** (commit `d2cad9d2`)
- This cleanup removed all non-rewards code from source, making migration simpler
- Source code is **tested and running in production** - must be migrated without modifications
- Goal: isolate rewards functionality into its own microfrontend

| Repository | Path | Role |
|------------|------|------|
| **Source** | `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place` | Origin (cleaned, commit `d2cad9d2`) |
| **Target** | `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` | This repo - destination |
| **SuperApp** | `~/dev/appSemPararv3` | Consumes this microfrontend via yalc |

---

## CRITICAL RULE

**NO LOGIC OR TYPING CHANGES ALLOWED**

Source code is production-tested. Only allowed changes:
1. **Import paths** - Adjust for new location, use `~/` alias
2. **Architecture conversion** - Redux ã Zustand per STYLE_GUIDE.md
3. **File location** - `newArch/store/rewardProgram/` ã `src/services/`
4. **Screen naming** - Remove "RewardProgram" suffix

---

## Path Mapping

| Source (card-place) | Target |
|---------------------|--------|
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/api/` | `src/services/api/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/models/` | `src/services/models/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository/` | `src/services/repository/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/` | `src/services/services/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/store/` | `src/services/store/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/hooks/` | `src/services/hooks/` |
| `newArch/store/utils/` | `src/services/utils/` |

## Screen Naming

Since this repo is dedicated to rewards, no "RewardProgram" suffix needed:

| Source | Target |
|--------|--------|
| `ExtractRewardProgram/` | `Extract/` |
| `LearnMoreRewardProgram/` | `LearnMore/` |
| `MyOrdersRewardProgram/` | `MyOrders/` |
| `RewardProgramMarketplace/` | `Marketplace/` |

---

## Architecture

| Aspect | Technology |
|--------|------------|
| **Type** | React Native microfrontend (exports raw TypeScript) |
| **State** | Zustand slices in `src/services/store/` |
| **Pattern** | Hook Component (index.ts logic + view.tsx render) |

### The `~` Alias (Critical)

All `~/` imports resolve to **SuperApp's code** at runtime:

| Import | Resolves To |
|--------|-------------|
| `~/store` | SuperApp's Zustand store **(MANDATORY - never relative paths)** |
| `~/constants/functions` | Analytics events |
| `~/redux/*` | Legacy Redux (SuperApp) |
| `~/routes/*` | Navigation |

**Tests only**: `~` maps to `./src/` via babel module-resolver.
**Types**: `@types/store.d.ts` provides TS types via module augmentation.

---

## Project Structure

```
src/
ããã @types/              # Module augmentation for SuperApp
ããã services/            # Domain logic (SOLID architecture)
ã   ããã api/             # HTTP clients (axios calls)
ã   ããã hooks/           # Service hooks (usePermission, etc.)
ã   ããã models/          # DTOs and TypeScript types
ã   ããã repository/      # Data mapping layer
ã   ããã services/        # Business orchestration
ã   ããã store/           # Zustand slices
ã   ããã utils/           # Utilities
ããã screens/             # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
ã   ããã Points/          # Main points screen
ã   ããã Extract/         # Points extract history
ã   ããã Marketplace/     # Marketplace for redemption
ã   ããã ...
ããã atomic/              # UI components (Atomic Design)
ã   ããã organisms/       # Complex components
ã   ããã templates/       # Screen layouts
ããã store/               # Root store composition
ã   ããã index.ts         # useRootStore creation
ã   ããã slices.ts        # Slice aggregation + export
ããã routes/              # React Navigation stack
ããã hooks/               # General hooks (tracking, etc.)
ããã styles/              # Theme and styling
ããã redux/               # Legacy Redux (to be cleaned/converted)
    ããã ducks/           # Redux ducks
    ããã sagas/           # Redux sagas
    ããã actions/         # Redux actions
```

---

## Code Rules

1. Store imports **MUST** use `~/store` (NEVER relative paths)
2. Screens **MUST** follow Hook Component pattern (index.ts hook + view.tsx render)
3. Never `git push`, only commit
4. Verify with `npm run typecheck`, not emulator
5. Tests mock `~/store` (not relative paths)
6. Follow `STYLE_GUIDE.md` for Zustand slices

## Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm run typecheck` | TS validation (filters node_modules errors) |
| `npm run sync-typings` | Generate types from SuperApp |
| `yarn sync:yalc` | Push to SuperApp for local testing |

## Exports (`src/index.js`)

```javascript
export { default as RewardProgramRoutes } from './routes';
export { PropsRewardProgramRoutes } from './routes/Models';
export { setSlicesRewardProgram as setRewardProgramSlices } from './store/slices';
```

---

## Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CLAUDE.md` | This file - context for agents |
| `STYLE_GUIDE.md` | Code patterns (Zustand, Hook Component) |
| `progress.txt` | Tasks, status, file lists, and session history |

## Quick Start

1. Read this file (CLAUDE.md)
2. Read `progress.txt` for tasks and current status
3. Run `npm run typecheck` to see current state
4. Continue with next pending task from progress.txt

1ã# Frontend Style Guide ã Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2ã
     3ãWelcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4ãThis version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5ã
     6ã> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ã
     7ã
     8ã---
     9ã
    10ã## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11ã- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12ã- [Components & Screens ã Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13ã- [Atomic Components ã Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14ã- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15ã- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16ã- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17ã- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18ã- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19ã- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20ã- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21ã- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22ã- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23ã
    24ã---
    25ã
    26ã## Introduction
    27ã
    28ãThe goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    29ã
    30ãKey decisions:
    31ã- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32ã- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33ã- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34ã- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35ã
    36ã---
    37ã
    38ã## Components & Screens ã Hook Component Pattern
    39ã
    40ãEach screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41ã
    42ã```
    43ãscreens/Home/
    44ãããã index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45ãããã view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46ãããã Models/
    47ã    ããã index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48ã```
    49ã
    50ã**Models/index.d.ts**
    51ã```ts
    52ãexport interface HomeParams {
    53ã  welcome?: string;
    54ã}
    55ãexport interface HomeState {
    56ã  greeting: string;
    57ã  isLoading: boolean;
    58ã}
    59ãexport interface HomeHandlers {
    60ã  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61ã}
    62ãexport type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63ã```
    64ã
    65ã**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66ã```ts
    67ãimport { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68ãimport type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69ãimport { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70ã

    93ã**view.tsx (render)**

   123ã---
   124ã
   125ã## Atomic Components ã Hook Component Pattern
   126ã
   127ã```
   128ãatomic/atoms/Button/
   129ãããã index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130ãããã view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131ãããã Models/

   133ã```
   134ã
   135ã**Models/index.d.ts**
   136ã```ts
   137ãexport interface ButtonProps {
   138ã  text: string;
   139ã  disabled?: boolean;
   140ã  onPress?: () => void;
   141ã}
   142ãexport interface ButtonState {
   143ã  pressed: boolean;
   144ã}
   145ãexport interface ButtonHandlers {
   146ã  handlePress: () => void;

   150ã
   151ã**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152ã```ts
   153ãimport { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154ãimport type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155ã
   156ãexport function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157ã  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158ã
   159ã  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160ã    setPressed(true);
   161ã    props.onPress?.();
   162ã    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163ã  }, [props.onPress]);
   164ã
   165ã  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166ã}

   168ã
   169ã**view.tsx (render)**

   190ã---
   191ã
   192ã## Project Organization
   193ã
   194ã```
   195ãsrc/
   196ãããã @types/            # Global TS types
   197ãããã assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198ãããã atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199ãã   ããã atoms/
   200ãã   ããã molecules/
   201ãã   ããã organisms/
   202ãããã modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203ãããã screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204ãããã services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205ãã   ããã api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206ãã   ããã class/         # Class with logical requests
   207ãã   ããã hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208ãã   ããã repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209ãã   ããã services/      # Business orchestration
   210ãã   ããã storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211ãã   ããã store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212ãã   ããã models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213ãã   ããã utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214ãã   ããã index.ts       # Public exports
   215ãããã hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216ãããã routes/            # Navigation config
   217ãããã settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218ãããã utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219ã```
   220ã
   221ã> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222ã
   223ã---
   224ã
   225ã## Services Architecture
   226ã
   227ã**Flow:** `UI ã services ã repository ã api` and `UI ã services ã store (Zustand)`
   228ã
   229ã- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.
   230ã- **class/**: class with logical requests.
   231ã- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232ã- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.
   233ã- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.
   234ã- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.
   235ã- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).
   236ã- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.
   237ã- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238ã
   239ãPrinciples:
   240ã- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241ã- No circular dependencies.
   242ã- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243ã
   244ã---
   245ã
   246ã## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247ã
   248ã- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.
   249ã- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.
   250ã- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.
   251ã- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252ã
   253ã**Slice example**
   254ã```ts
   255ãimport type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256ãimport type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257ã
   258ãexport type AuthSlice = {
   259ã    auth: AuthState;
   260ã    authActions: AuthActions
   261ã};
   262ã
   263ãconst initialAuth = {
   264ã    user: null,
   265ã    loading: false,
   266ã    error: undefined,
   267ã}
   268ã
   269ãexport const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270ã    auth: initialAuth,
   271ã    authActions: {
   272ã        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273ã        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274ã        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275ã        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276ã    }
   277ã});
   278ã```
   279ã
   280ã**Root Store**
   281ã
   282ã- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps ã including SuperApp.
   283ã
   284ã```ts
   285ãimport { create } from "zustand";
   286ãimport { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287ãimport { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288ã
   289ãimport { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290ãimport { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291ã
   292ãimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293ã
   294ã/** Add your slice Type */
   295ãexport type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296ã
   297ãexport const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298ã  devtools(
   299ã    persist(
   300ã      immer((...a) => ({
   301ã        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302ã        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303ã      })),
   304ã      {
   305ã        name: "root-storage",
   306ã        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307ã        partialize: (s) => ({
   308ã          user: s.user,
   309ã          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310ã        }),
   311ã        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312ã      }
   313ã    ),
   314ã    { name: "RootStore" }
   315ã  )
   316ã);
   317ã```
   318ã
   319ã- For Use on Class.
   320ã
   321ã```ts
   322ãclass Auth {
   323ã  private readonly setAuth;
   324ã
   325ã  constructor () {
   326ã    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327ã  }
   328ã
   329ã  function doSomething(data) {
   330ã    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331ã  }
   332ã}
   333ã```
   334ã
   335ã- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336ã- UI never imports the store directly ã uses selectors
   337ã
   338ã```ts
   339ãconst loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340ãconst token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341ã```
   342ã
   343ã---
   344ã
   345ã## Routes Naming
   346ã
   347ãStandardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:
   348ã- ã `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)
   349ã- ã `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350ã
   351ã---
   352ã
   353ã## Folder Naming Rules
   354ã
   355ã| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356ã|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357ã| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358ã| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359ã
   360ã---
   361ã
   362ã## Code Standards
   363ã
   364ã**Language**: English only.  
   365ã**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366ã
   367ã**Explanatory variables**
   368ã```js
   369ãconst onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370ãconst getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371ãconst isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372ãisNumber(1);
   373ã```
   374ã
   375ã**Semantic constants**
   376ã```js
   377ãconst DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378ãsetTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379ã```
   380ã
   381ã**Library workarounds with link**
   382ã```js
   383ã// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384ã// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385ãevent.target.value = "";
   386ã```
   387ã
   388ã**JSDoc**
   389ã```js
   390ã/**
   391ã * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392ã * @param {*} eventName
   393ã * @param {*} maxLength
   394ã */
   395ã```
   396ã
   397ã**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**
   398ã```ts
   399ãuseEffect(() => {
   400ã  (async () => {
   401ã    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402ã    setSum(42);
   403ã  })();
   404ã}, [
   405ã  setSum,
   406ã]);
   407ã```
   408ã
   409ã**Extract conditions**
   410ã```ts
   411ãconst hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412ãif (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413ã```
   414ã
   415ã**Optional chaining**
   416ã```ts
   417ãconst answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418ã```
   419ã
   420ã**JSX indentation**
   421ã```tsx
   422ã{
   423ã  !isEnd && (
   424ã    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425ã  )
   426ã}
   427ã```
   428ã
   429ã**Early returns**
   430ã```ts
   431ãif (!data) return null;
   432ãreturn <View />;
   433ã```
   434ã
   435ã**Nullish coalescing**
   436ã```ts
   437ãreturn data ?? 0;
   438ã```
   439ã---
   440ã
   441ã## Styles Patterns
   442ã
   443ã- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.
   444ã- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445ã
   446ã---
   447ã
   448ã## Cache Pattern
   449ã
   450ãKeep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451ã
   452ã```ts
   453ãimport storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454ã
   455ãexport interface CachedData<T> {
   456ã  timestamp: number;
   457ã  data: T;
   458ã}
   459ã
   460ãexport interface StorageContract<T> {
   461ã  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462ã  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463ã  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464ã}
   465ã
   466ãexport class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467ã  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468ã
   469ã  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470ã    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471ã    if (!json) return null;
   472ã    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473ã  }
   474ã
   475ã  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476ã    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477ã    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478ã  }
   479ã
   480ã  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481ã    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482ã  }
   483ã}
   484ã```
   485ã
   486ã**Guidelines**
   487ã- One storage class per module/feature.
   488ã- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489ã- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490ã- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491ã- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492ã
   493ã---
   494ã
   495ã## Checklist
   496ã
   497ã- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498ã- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499ã- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500ã- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501ã- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502ã- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503ã- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504ã
   505ã---
   506ã

## Problem Analysis

## Current Project Reality

**Project**: `@semparar/mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram` v0.0.1
**Type**: React Native microfrontend for Reward Program (consumed by SuperApp)

### Architecture (Actual)
- **State**: Hybrid - Zustand (new domains) + Redux (legacy, still active)
- **Pattern**: Hook Component (`index.ts` + `view.tsx`)
- **Services**: SOLID architecture with 4 complete domains

### Zustand Domains (All Complete)

- RewardProgramMarketplace, AirlineMilesMarketplace
- LearnMoreRewardProgram, MyOrdersRewardProgram

```markdown
# mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram

React Native microfrontend for Reward Program. Consumed by SuperApp.

## Quick Start
1. Read this file
2. Read ./STYLE_GUIDE.md for patterns
3. Run `npm run typecheck` to verify

## Architecture
| Aspect | Technology |
|--------|------------|
| Type | React Native microfrontend |
| State | Zustand (new) + Redux (legacy) |
| Pattern | Hook Component (index.ts + view.tsx) |

## Project Structure
src/
ããã services/      # Domain logic (Zustand)
ããã screens/       # 10 screens (Hook Component)
ããã atomic/        # UI components
ããã redux/         # Legacy state (points, marketplace, rescue)
ããã routes/        # Navigation
ããã index.ts       # Exports

## Zustand Domains (Complete)
| Domain | Layers |
|--------|--------|
| airlineMiles | api, model, service, store, hook |
| extract | api, model, repository, service, store |
| parameter | api, model, repository, service, store |
| permission | api, model, repository, service, store, hook |

## Pending Work
| Item | Status | Missing |
|------|--------|---------|
| products | Partial | service, store |
| marketplace | Pending | Redux ã Zustand |
| rescue | Pending | Redux ã Zustand |

## The `~` Alias (Critical)
All `~/` imports resolve to SuperApp at runtime.
Tests: `~` maps to `./src/` via babel.

## Code Rules
- Store imports MUST use `~/store`
- Screens MUST follow Hook Component pattern
- Never git push, only commit
- Verify with `npm run typecheck`

## Commands
| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| npm run typecheck | TS validation |
| npm run sync-typings | Generate types from SuperApp |
| yarn sync:yalc | Push to SuperApp |

## Exports (src/index.ts)
- RewardsProgramRoutes
- RewardsProgramRootStore (type)
- setRewardsProgramSlices
- clearRewardsProgramStore

## Documentation
- ./STYLE_GUIDE.md - Zustand + Hook Component patterns
```

---

## Verification

1. Run `npm run typecheck` after cleanup.ts fix
2. Read updated CLAUDE.md to confirm accuracy
3. Verify .claude folder has only CLAUDE.md and progress.txt

5. **Pagination Support:** Zustand's `appendExtractData()` not in Redux - indicates enhanced functionality post-migration

6. **Store Composition:** Zustand uses slice pattern with `setRewardsProgramSlices()` - cleaner than Redux combineReducers

7. **Unimplemented Sagas:** No saga files beyond models - business logic likely in service layer already

---

### 9. MIGRATION DEPENDENCIES

**Extract ã Parameter dependency:**
- Parameter store sets `parameterPointsProgram.data` which includes pointsRescueSentence
- Extract store may need to compute `pointsQuantity` from this (currently in Redux reducer)

**Permission ã Account dependency:**

- Need to ensure permission store can access account data during migration

## SUMMARY

**Still needs migration:** 23 fields + complete structure improvements

# mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram

React Native microfrontend for Reward Program. Consumed by SuperApp.

## Quick Start

1. Read `progress.txt` for current tasks and detailed implementation notes
2. Read `./STYLE_GUIDE.md` (root) for Zustand + Hook Component patterns
3. Run `npm run typecheck` to verify TypeScript

## Architecture

| Aspect | Technology |
|--------|------------|
| Type | React Native microfrontend (exports raw TypeScript) |
| State | Zustand (new domains) + Redux (legacy, being migrated) |
| Pattern | Hook Component (`index.ts` logic + `view.tsx` render) |

## Project Structure

```
src/
ããã services/          # Domain logic (Zustand - SOLID architecture)
ã   ããã api/           # HTTP clients
ã   ããã models/        # Types, interfaces, enums
ã   ããã repository/    # Data mapping
ã   ããã services/      # Business logic
ã   ããã store/         # Zustand slices
ã   ããã hooks/         # Service hooks
ã   ããã utils/         # Helpers (cleanup, participantId)
ããã screens/           # 10 screens (Hook Component pattern)
ããã atomic/            # UI components (atoms, organisms, templates)
ããã redux/             # Legacy state (being migrated to Zustand)
ã   ããã ducks/         # points.ts, rescue.ts, getMarketplace.ts
ããã routes/            # Navigation
ããã hooks/             # General hooks
ããã index.ts           # Exports
```

## Zustand Domains

| Domain | Status | Layers |
|--------|--------|--------|
| airlineMiles | Complete | api, model, service, store, hook |
| extract | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store |
| parameter | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store |
| permission | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store, hook |
| products | Pending | needs all layers |
| rescue | Pending | needs all layers |
| marketplace | Pending | needs all layers |

## The `~` Alias (Critical)

All `~/` imports resolve to **SuperApp's code** at runtime:
- `~/store` ã SuperApp's Zustand store (MANDATORY for store imports)
- `~/redux/*` ã Legacy Redux
- `~/routes/*` ã Navigation

**Tests only**: `~` maps to `./src/` via babel module-resolver.

## Code Rules

1. Store imports **MUST** use `~/store` (never relative paths)
2. Screens **MUST** follow Hook Component pattern
3. **NO LOGIC CHANGES** during migration - structure only
4. Verify with `npm run typecheck`
5. Never `git push`, only commit

## Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm run typecheck` | TypeScript validation |
| `npm run sync-typings` | Generate types from SuperApp |
| `yarn sync:yalc` | Push to SuperApp for testing |
| `npm test` | Run tests |

## Exports (src/index.ts)

```typescript
export { RewardsProgramRoutes } from './routes';
export { type RewardsProgramRootStore } from './services';
export { setRewardsProgramSlices } from './services/store/slices';
export { clearRewardsProgramStore } from './services/utils';
```

## Current Work

See `progress.txt` for:
- Detailed migration tasks (41 subtasks)
- Redux state shapes to migrate
- Zustand patterns to follow
- Test patterns
- Complete code snippets

## Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CLAUDE.md` | This file - quick reference |
| `progress.txt` | Detailed tasks, code snippets, persistent memory |
| `./STYLE_GUIDE.md` | Zustand + Hook Component patterns (root folder) |

| Type | React Native microfrontend (exports raw TypeScript) |
| State | Zustand (new domains) + Redux (legacy, being migrated) |

```
src/
ããã services/          # Domain logic (Zustand - SOLID architecture)
ã   ããã api/           # HTTP clients

ã   ããã repository/    # Data mapping

ã   ããã store/         # Zustand slices

ã   ããã utils/         # Helpers (cleanup, participantId)
ããã screens/           # 10 screens (Hook Component pattern)

ããã redux/             # Legacy state (being migrated to Zustand)
ã   ããã ducks/         # points.ts, rescue.ts, getMarketplace.ts
ããã routes/            # Navigation

## Zustand Domains

|--------|--------|--------|
| airlineMiles | Complete | api, model, service, store, hook |
| extract | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store |
| parameter | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store |
| permission | Complete | api, model, repository, service, store, hook |
| products | Pending | needs all layers |
| rescue | Pending | needs all layers |
| marketplace | Pending | needs all layers |

## The `~` Alias (Critical)

All `~/` imports resolve to **SuperApp's code** at runtime:
- `~/store` ã SuperApp's Zustand store (MANDATORY for store imports)
- `~/redux/*` ã Legacy Redux
- `~/routes/*` ã Navigation

**Tests only**: `~` maps to `./src/` via babel module-resolver.

## Code Rules

1. Store imports **MUST** use `~/store` (never relative paths)
2. Screens **MUST** follow Hook Component pattern
3. **NO LOGIC CHANGES** during migration - structure only
4. Verify with `npm run typecheck`
5. Never `git push`, only commit

| `yarn sync:yalc` | Push to SuperApp for testing |
| `npm test` | Run tests |

# mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram

React Native microfrontend for **Reward Program** (Programa de Pontos). Consumed by SuperApp (`appSemPararv3`).

## Migration Context

Migrating rewards code from `rnm-app-fintech-card-place` to this dedicated repository.

**Why this migration:**
- Source repository (card-place) was **cleaned** to contain **only rewards-related code** (commit `d2cad9d2`)
- This cleanup removed all non-rewards code from source, making migration simpler
- Source code is **tested and running in production** - must be migrated without modifications
- Goal: isolate rewards functionality into its own microfrontend

| Repository | Path | Role |
|------------|------|------|
| **Source** | `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place` | Origin (cleaned, commit `d2cad9d2`) |
| **Target** | `~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram` | This repo - destination |
| **SuperApp** | `~/dev/appSemPararv3` | Consumes this microfrontend via yalc |

---

## CRITICAL RULE

**NO LOGIC OR TYPING CHANGES ALLOWED**

Source code is production-tested. Only allowed changes:
1. **Import paths** - Adjust for new location, use `~/` alias
2. **Architecture conversion** - Redux ã Zustand per STYLE_GUIDE.md
3. **File location** - `newArch/store/rewardProgram/` ã `src/services/`
4. **Screen naming** - Remove "RewardProgram" suffix

---

## Path Mapping

| Source (card-place) | Target |
|---------------------|--------|
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/api/` | `src/services/api/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/models/` | `src/services/models/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository/` | `src/services/repository/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/` | `src/services/services/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/store/` | `src/services/store/` |
| `newArch/store/rewardProgram/hooks/` | `src/services/hooks/` |
| `newArch/store/utils/` | `src/services/utils/` |

## Screen Naming

Since this repo is dedicated to rewards, no "RewardProgram" suffix needed:

| Source | Target |
|--------|--------|
| `ExtractRewardProgram/` | `Extract/` |
| `LearnMoreRewardProgram/` | `LearnMore/` |
| `MyOrdersRewardProgram/` | `MyOrders/` |
| `RewardProgramMarketplace/` | `Marketplace/` |

---

## Architecture

| Aspect | Technology |
|--------|------------|
| **Type** | React Native microfrontend (exports raw TypeScript) |
| **State** | Zustand slices in `src/services/store/` |
| **Pattern** | Hook Component (index.ts logic + view.tsx render) |

### The `~` Alias (Critical)

All `~/` imports resolve to **SuperApp's code** at runtime:

| Import | Resolves To |
|--------|-------------|
| `~/store` | SuperApp's Zustand store **(MANDATORY - never relative paths)** |
| `~/constants/functions` | Analytics events |
| `~/redux/*` | Legacy Redux (SuperApp) |
| `~/routes/*` | Navigation |

**Tests only**: `~` maps to `./src/` via babel module-resolver.
**Types**: `@types/store.d.ts` provides TS types via module augmentation.

---

## Project Structure

```
src/
ããã @types/              # Module augmentation for SuperApp
ããã services/            # Domain logic (SOLID architecture)
ã   ããã api/             # HTTP clients (axios calls)
ã   ããã hooks/           # Service hooks (usePermission, etc.)
ã   ããã models/          # DTOs and TypeScript types
ã   ããã repository/      # Data mapping layer
ã   ããã services/        # Business orchestration
ã   ããã store/           # Zustand slices
ã   ããã utils/           # Utilities
ããã screens/             # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
ã   ããã Points/          # Main points screen
ã   ããã Extract/         # Points extract history
ã   ããã Marketplace/     # Marketplace for redemption
ã   ããã ...
ããã atomic/              # UI components (Atomic Design)
ã   ããã organisms/       # Complex components
ã   ããã templates/       # Screen layouts
ããã store/               # Root store composition
ã   ããã index.ts         # useRootStore creation
ã   ããã slices.ts        # Slice aggregation + export
ããã routes/              # React Navigation stack
ããã hooks/               # General hooks (tracking, etc.)
ããã styles/              # Theme and styling
ããã redux/               # Legacy Redux (to be cleaned/converted)
    ããã ducks/           # Redux ducks
    ããã sagas/           # Redux sagas
    ããã actions/         # Redux actions
```

---

## Code Rules

1. Store imports **MUST** use `~/store` (NEVER relative paths)
2. Screens **MUST** follow Hook Component pattern (index.ts hook + view.tsx render)
3. Never `git push`, only commit
4. Verify with `npm run typecheck`, not emulator
5. Tests mock `~/store` (not relative paths)
6. Follow `STYLE_GUIDE.md` for Zustand slices

## Commands

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm run typecheck` | TS validation (filters node_modules errors) |
| `npm run sync-typings` | Generate types from SuperApp |
| `yarn sync:yalc` | Push to SuperApp for local testing |

## Exports (`src/index.js`)

```javascript
export { default as RewardProgramRoutes } from './routes';
export { PropsRewardProgramRoutes } from './routes/Models';
export { setSlicesRewardProgram as setRewardProgramSlices } from './store/slices';
```

---

## Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `CLAUDE.md` | This file - context for agents |
| `STYLE_GUIDE.md` | Code patterns (Zustand, Hook Component) |
| `progress.txt` | Tasks, status, file lists, and session history |

## Quick Start

1. Read this file (CLAUDE.md)
2. Read `progress.txt` for tasks and current status
3. Run `npm run typecheck` to see current state
4. Continue with next pending task from progress.txt
